issue_title: Ignore error_handler errors under ignore_permission_denied = True?
issue_text:
### Description

Hey!

For local development, we are running our Django app inside a Linux Docker container, launched from Windows host with help of WSL2, with sources typically mounted from the Windows file system. We are using `watchfiles` instead of Django's built-in reloader with help of [django_watchfiles](https://github.com/adamchainz/django-watchfiles). Thanks to [this code](https://github.com/samuelcolvin/watchfiles/blob/9f19a18da5323d0e63a2ee16c47ed6c819f89be5/watchfiles/main.py#L33
success_criteria: 应修复 issue《Ignore error_handler errors under ignore_permission_denied = True?》中描述的错误行为；核心逻辑预计位于 `watchfiles/main.py`；并补齐 1 到 3 个稳定回归测试，确保当前错误行为消失且相邻边界不回归。

metadata.ready_note: 已压成可运行 semi-real 回归任务；当前纳入 challenge manifest，暂未纳入正式 manifest。
